description: IR checklist verifier: parses solution.md for file paths, computes IR precision/recall against ground_truth.json files list, evaluates dependency chain ordering, and checks keyword presence. Composite: 0.4*task_quality + 0.3*file_recall + 0.2*file_precision + 0.1*dep_accuracy. Perfect input lists all 13 ground truth files in Files Examined and reproduces the exact 8-step dependency chain, plus includes feature keywords (FixComponent, FixEndpoint, @UriEndpoint, @UriParam, @Component, createEndpoint, FIX protocol). Empty input is a zero-byte solution.md that triggers the no-output guard.

perfect_input.solution.md: Placed at /logs/agent/solution.md at verification time. Contains all 13 GT files in Files Examined section, exact dependency chain, and FIX protocol feature keywords.

empty_input.solution.md: Empty file. Verifier checks wc -c < 100 and treats as no-solution.

scoring_notes.perfect: File recall = 13/13 = 1.0, file precision = 13/13 = 1.0, dep accuracy = 8/8 coverage + order = 1.0. Task quality depends on compilation and keyword grep in workspace (fixture only covers solution.md path). When scored via solution.md IR pipeline only: 0.3*1.0 + 0.2*1.0 + 0.1*1.0 = 0.6 minimum from IR alone.
scoring_notes.empty: Solution.md under 100 bytes triggers HAS_SOLUTION=0. Combined with HAS_CHANGES=0, outputs 0.0 immediately.
